ShortDescription.SourceString:
<text color="FFFFFFFF" fontface="black" size="20" Case="AllCaps">As a Bassassin, it pays to be cold-blooded. Get the Contract Giller Outfit, Dorsal Destroyer Back Bling, and complete Quests to earn up to 1,000 V-Bucks!</>
This pack contains:
ShortDescription.LocalizedString:
<text color="FFFFFFFF" fontface="black" size="20" Case="AllCaps">As a Bassassin, it pays to be cold-blooded. Get the Contract Giller Outfit, Dorsal Destroyer Back Bling, and complete Quests to earn up to 1,000 V-Bucks!</>

DisclaimerText.SourceString:
V-Bucks are in-game currency that can be spent in Fortnite. You can purchase new customization items in the Shop for Fortnite Battle Royale, LEGO® Fortnite, Fortnite Festival or Rocket Racing, as well as additional content like this season's Battle Pass!

Note: Not all items may be available in Save the World mode. Bassassin Challenge Pack does not include Fresh Fish Pickaxe.

*Save the World mode not included.
